item.title: Walmart's bestselling $208 mid-century modern armchair is on sale for only $110
item.description: It has "such an expensive look to it."

item.title: Cathie Wood buys $46 million of tumbling tech stock

item.title: Hunter boots are on sale for only $50, and they're 'perfect for winter'
item.description: Shoppers say they're stylish and comfortable.
